name: backend-template
description: Reusable Node.js backend template extracted from ChuHai_ai_be.

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch ./src --ext ts,json --exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r dotenv/config --files src/main.ts
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r dotenv/config --files src/main.ts
scripts.seed:admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=development ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r dotenv/config --files src/scripts/seedAdmin.ts
